title: viola woroschilovii
intro: Viola woroschilovii, a perennial flowering plant species within the violet family. It is traditionally used in medicine, valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems due to its expectorant properties. Viola woroschilovii is commonly prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal use.
